# Maanasa Narayan

> Software Engineer based in the Bay Area, CA. Builds scalable web applications and backend cloud systems. Engineering experience across Kayak, Amazon, Nokia, and Adobe.

## About

Maanasa Narayan is a software engineer with experience across full-stack web development and cloud backend systems. Holds an M.S. in Computer Science from Northeastern University (GPA 3.9/4.0) and a B.E. in Computer Science from KSIT, VTU.

Currently at Kayak working on Java-based airline integrations across search, availability, seat-map, baggage, booking, and receipt endpoints, shipping via GitHub Actions with A/B experiments and Kibana observability.

## Skills

- Languages: Java, Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, SQL, HTML, CSS
- Web: React, Redux, Node, Express, Spring Boot, REST APIs
- Databases: MySQL, MongoDB, SQLite
- Cloud & DevOps: AWS Lambda, API Gateway, S3, Docker, Kubernetes, GitHub Actions, CI/CD, serverless
- Tools: Elasticsearch, Kibana, Puppeteer, JUnit, Jest, IntelliJ, VS Code

## Experience

- Kayak — Software Engineer, Boston, MA (Jul 2023 – Present)
- Amazon — Software Engineering Intern, Seattle, WA (Sep 2022 – Dec 2022)
- Nokia — Application Developer Co-op, Raleigh, NC (May 2022 – Aug 2022)
- Adobe — Software Engineer, Bengaluru, India (Nov 2018 – Aug 2021)
- Infosys — Systems Engineer Trainee, Mysuru, India (Jul 2018 – Sep 2018)

## Selected Projects

- Stock Trader (MERN, Northeastern, 2021): Trading platform with role-based access and live financial API integration.
- Bug Bash (Amazon, 2021): React + Node automation tool on AWS Lambda for Amazon's Choice badge validation; eliminated ~20 engineer-hours per release.
- Interactive Adventure Game (Java, Northeastern, 2021): OO/MVC Swing GUI game with 100+ JUnit tests.
- BeatBeat (Android, Northeastern, 2021): Music learning game built in Java.
